class.name: autoware::redundancy_switcher::RedundancySwitcherAdapter
class.description: UDS-based switcher adapter for redundancy_switcher (https://github.com/tier4/redundancy_switcher). Communicates with the switcher process via Unix Domain Sockets using CBOR-serialized ElectionRequest/ElectionStatus messages. Supports priority-based switching via UpdatePriorityCommand in addition to self_fault_request.

class.name: autoware::redundancy_switcher::NonRedundantSwitcherAdapter
class.description: Adapter for non-redundant (single-ECU) systems. Sets switcher signals to permanently stable and publishes active_control_unit [0, 2] at startup. All fault-related commands are ignored.

class.name: autoware::redundancy_switcher::SimpleSwitcherAdapter
class.description: Topic-based switcher adapter that works with SimpleSwitcherNode for simulation and testing. Supports both self_interruption and priority-based switching.
